title: salix × sordida var. rakosina
intro: Salix × sordida var. rakosina, also known as Rakouska willow or Salix rakosina, is a variant of the hybrid willow plant (Salix sordida). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its salicylic acid content. The health benefits of Salix × sordida var. rakosina include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
